title: About Us | Sleaford & North Hykeham
meta_description: The role of the Sleaford and North Hykeham Conservative Association (SNHCA) is to promote Conservatism within our parliamentary constituency area. This means using our resources to communicate with the electorate and to support Conservative Candidates who are seeking to become Town, District and County Councillors and Members of both the Westminster and European Parliaments. The Chairman and Association officers are elected at the Annual General Meeting (AGM) - these positions are all voluntary and unpaid.
headings: h3: Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association
text_excerpt: About Us | Sleaford & North Hykeham Skip to main content Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives Main navigation About Us Get involved News People Events Contact Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives About Us Tweet The role of the Sleaford and North Hykeham Conservative Association (SNHCA) is to promote Conservatism within our parliamentary constituency area. This means using our resources to communicate with the electorate and to support Conservative Candidates who are seeking to become Town, District and County Councillors and Members of both the Westminster and European Parliaments. The Chairman and Association officers are elected at the Annual General Meeting (AGM) - these positions are all voluntary and unpaid. The Constituency area includes the administrative areas of North Kesteven District Council where the Conservatives are the largest political group and a part of South Kesteven District Council (to the North and West of Grantham) where Conservative Councillors are in the majority. The Constituency is wholly within the Conservative controlled Lincolnshire County Council administrative area. Our aim is to provide current information about the constituency and to promote interest in our Association and the Conservative Party. Our website helps us to do this and you will find lots of useful information in it about who we are, what we do, how to contact us links which you can use to keep up to date with latest Conservative News and Stories. We are always pleased to welcome new members and anyone who wishes to assist in the promotion of Conservatism. If you have any comments then please feel free to email us at [email protected] About Us EXECUTIVE COUNCIL Our Map Clubs Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Us Get a postal vote Get involved Young Conservatives Promoted by Ian Carrington on behalf of Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association, both at PO Box 11284 Sleaford NG34 4FW Copyright 2026 Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association.
